brand: INSTRUCTIONS:
brand            = Machine manufacturer (Haas / Mazak / DMG Mori / Okuma / Fanuc / Doosan / Hurco / Brother / Makino / Kitamura / etc.)
model            = Exact model name as printed on the machine (VF-2SS / NMV 3000 / etc.)
max_rpm          = Spindle max RPM — check machine nameplate or spindle spec sheet
spindle_hp       = Nameplate spindle HP (continuous rating — not peak)
taper            = CAT40 | CAT50 | BT30 | BT40 | BT50 | HSK32 | HSK63 | HSK100 | CAPTO C5 | CAPTO C6
drive_type       = direct | belt | gear
dual_contact     = true | false  (BBT / HSK / Capto = true; standard CAT = false)
coolant_types    = comma-separated list in braces: {flood} or {flood
tsc_psi          = Through-spindle coolant pressure in PSI (leave blank if no TSC)
x_travel_in      = X-axis travel in inches
y_travel_in      = Y-axis travel in inches
z_travel_in      = Z-axis travel in inches
machine_type     = vmc | hmc | 5axis | lathe | turning_center | mill_turn
control          = Haas | Fanuc | Siemens | Mazatrol | Okuma OSP | Heidenhain | Hurco WinMax | Brother | Mitsubishi
notes            = Any shop-relevant notes (e.g. "40-taper BBT dual contact option installed")
